'''yachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wretchlessly|wretchlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wretchlessly|wretchlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yachate|yachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yachatesher|yachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachatesherĂ«m|yachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yachatero|yachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yachateshĂ«|yachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachateshĂ«m|yachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyachatero|gokiyachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyachateshĂ«|gokiyachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachateshĂ«m|gokiyachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyachankerom|goyachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyachankeshĂ«|goyachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachankeshĂ«m|goyachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyachankeya|goyachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yachaterom|yachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachatemu|yachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yachateya|yachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyachaterom|gokiyachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachatemu|gokiyachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyachateya|gokiyachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yachachate|yachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yachachatesher|yachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachachatesherĂ«m|yachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yachachatero|yachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yachachateshĂ«|yachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachachateshĂ«m|yachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyachachatero|gokiyachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyachachateshĂ«|gokiyachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachachateshĂ«m|gokiyachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyachachankerom|goyachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyachachankeshĂ«|goyachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachachankeshĂ«m|goyachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyachachankeya|goyachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yachachaterom|yachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachachatemu|yachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yachachateya|yachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyachachaterom|gokiyachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachachatemu|gokiyachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyachachateya|gokiyachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠte|yĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠtesher|yĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠtero|yĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠchĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠchĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠchĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠterom|yĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠtemu|yĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠchĂŠteya|yĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠchĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠchĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafchafte|yafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafchaftesher|yafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafchaftesherĂ«m|yafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafchaftero|yafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafchafteshĂ«|yafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafchafteshĂ«m|yafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafchaftero|gokiyafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafchafteshĂ«|gokiyafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafchafteshĂ«m|gokiyafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafchafnkerom|goyafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafchafnkeshĂ«|goyafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafchafnkeshĂ«m|goyafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafchafnkeya|goyafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafchafterom|yafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafchaftemu|yafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafchafteya|yafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafchafterom|gokiyafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafchaftemu|gokiyafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafchafteya|gokiyafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
